info.name: RustChain API v2.2.1
info.description:
Complete API collection for RustChain v2.2.1 (Security Hardened, Mainnet Candidate).

This collection covers all endpoints exposed by the integrated node at `node/rustchain_v2_integrated_v2.2.1_rip200.py`.

Features covered:
- RIP-0005 (Epochs)
- RIP-0008 (Withdrawals + Replay Protection)
- RIP-0009 (Finality)
- RIP-0142 (Multisig Governance)
- RIP-0143 (Readiness Aggregator)
- RIP-0144 (Genesis Freeze)
- RIP-0146/147 (Attestation & OUI enforcement)
- RIP-0173 (Lottery/Eligibility Oracle)
- RIP-0200 (Round-Robin 1CPU1Vote)
- RIP-0200b (Deflationary Bounty Decay)
- RIP-0301 (Fee Pool)
- Beacon Protocol (OpenClaw envelope anchoring)
- Signed Wallet Transfers (Ed25519)
- 2-Phase Commit Pending Ledger
- P2P Sync

Admin endpoints require the `X-API-Key` or `X-Admin-Key` header set to the value of the `RC_ADMIN_KEY` environment variable.

variable.description: Base URL for the RustChain node
Example miner public key / wallet address

item.name: Health & Status
item.description: Health checks, readiness probes, and system status endpoints.

request.description: Returns node health status including DB read/write status, backup age, tip age, and uptime.
Returns whether the DB is reachable and migrations have been applied.

header.description: Admin key for detailed check output (optional - unauthenticated returns only ok/fail)

request.description: Single PASS/FAIL aggregator for all go/no-go checks. Unauthenticated callers receive only the boolean result. Admin callers see detailed per-check output.
Returns system-wide statistics: version, chain ID, current epoch, total miners, total balance, pending withdrawals, and feature/security flags.
Prometheus-format metrics endpoint for monitoring.
Prometheus-format metrics for MAC OUI seen/denied, unique MACs in 24h, stale/active attestations, and enrollment ok/reject counters.
Returns the OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification for the node.
Get the current OUI enforcement toggle state.

item.name: Attestation
item.description: Hardware attestation endpoints for Proof of Antiquity. Miners must attest their hardware to participate in epoch enrollment.

request.description: Issues a challenge nonce for hardware attestation. The nonce expires after 5 minutes.
Submit hardware attestation with fingerprint and entropy validation. Includes hardware binding (one machine = one wallet), IP rate limiting, OUI enforcement, and temporal review.

response.name: 429 - Rate limited

request.description: Admin debug endpoint: shows miner's enrollment eligibility, attestation status, MAC data, and enrollment check config. Requires admin key.

item.name: Epochs & Enrollment
item.description: Epoch lifecycle, miner enrollment, and lottery eligibility (RIP-0005, RIP-0173, RIP-0200).

request.description: Returns current epoch info: epoch number, slot, pot size, enrolled miners count, blocks per epoch, and total supply.
Enroll a miner in the current epoch. Requires prior attestation and MAC validation. Weight is calculated from hardware family/arch. VM-detected miners receive negligible weight (1e-9).
RIP-200 round-robin eligibility check. Returns whether the miner is eligible for the current slot.
Get the reward distribution for a specific epoch.
Settle (distribute) rewards for a specific epoch. Admin/cron callable. Requires admin key.

item.name: Block Headers
item.description: Signed block header ingestion and chain tip queries.

request.description: Admin-set or update the header-signing Ed25519 public key for a miner. The pubkey_hex must be exactly 64 hex characters. Requires admin API key.

Ingest a signed block header from a v2 miner. Verifies Ed25519 signature, validates header continuity, persists, and updates tip. On testnet with RC_TESTNET_ALLOW_INLINE_PUBKEY=1, the pubkey can be provided inline. Automatically settles epoch rewards when enough blocks are mined.
Returns the current chain tip: latest slot, miner who produced it, tip age in seconds, and signature prefix.

item.name: Wallet & Balance
item.description: Balance queries, transfer history, signed transfers, and the 2-phase commit pending ledger.

request.description: Get miner balance. Checks both miner_pk and miner_id columns for backwards compatibility. Returns balance in RTC and micro-units (i64).
Get balance for a specific miner by miner_id or address query parameter.
Get public transfer history for a wallet. Returns sent/received transfers with status, amounts, memos, and confirmation timestamps.

Transfer RTC with Ed25519 signature verification. Supports both regular RTC addresses and bcn_ beacon addresses. Uses 2-phase commit: transfer enters pending state and confirms after 24 hours. Includes replay protection via nonce tracking.

response.name: 200 - Transfer pending
response.body:
{
  "ok": true,
  "verified": true,
  "signature_type": "Ed25519",
  "replay_protected": true,
  "phase": "pending",
  "pending_id": 42,
  "tx_hash": "abc123def456789012345678",
  "from_address": "RTCabcdef...",
  "to_address": "RTCrecipient...",
  "amount_rtc": 10.0,
  "chain_id": "rustchain-mainnet-candidate",
  "confirms_at": 1710086400,
  "confirms_in_hours": 24.0,
  "message": "Transfer pending. Will confirm in 24 hours unless voided."
}

request.description: Admin-initiated transfer with 2-phase commit. Transfer enters pending state and confirms after 24 hours unless voided. Requires admin key.

response.name: 200 - Transfer pending
response.body:
{
  "ok": true,
  "phase": "pending",
  "pending_id": 42,
  "tx_hash": "abc123def456789012345678",
  "from_miner": "founder_community",
  "to_miner": "g4-powerbook-01",
  "amount_rtc": 5.0,
  "confirms_at": 1710086400,
  "confirms_in_hours": 24.0,
  "message": "Transfer pending. Will confirm in 24 hours unless voided."
}

request.description: Resolve a bcn_ beacon ID to its RTC wallet address and Ed25519 public key from the Beacon Atlas.
Return all wallet balances sorted by amount descending. Requires admin key. Supports limit parameter (max 5000).
Export all miner balances with grand total. Requires admin key.

query.description: Optional - omit to get all ledger entries

request.description: Get immutable transaction ledger entries (optionally filtered by miner). Returns last 200 entries. Requires admin key.

item.name: Pending Ledger (2-Phase Commit)
item.description: Manage the 2-phase commit pending ledger for transfers. Pending transfers confirm after 24 hours unless voided.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, voided, or 'all'

request.description: List pending (or all) transfers in the 2-phase commit ledger. Requires admin key.
Void a pending transfer before it confirms. Can identify the transfer by pending_id or tx_hash. Only pending-status transfers can be voided. Requires admin key.
Worker endpoint: confirms all pending transfers whose 24-hour delay has elapsed. Checks sender balance at confirmation time. Logs to immutable ledger. Requires admin key.
Check balance integrity: verifies that the sum of all ledger deltas matches the balance table for every miner. Requires admin key.

item.name: Withdrawals
item.description: Register withdrawal keys, request withdrawals, and check withdrawal status (RIP-0008).

request.description: Register an sr25519 public key for withdrawals. First-time registration is allowed; key rotation requires admin key. Requires admin key.

Request an RTC withdrawal. Requires registered sr25519 key, sufficient balance, valid signature, and unique nonce (replay protection). Subject to daily limits. A withdrawal fee is deducted and routed to the community mining pool (RIP-301).
Get the status of a specific withdrawal by its withdrawal_id.
Get withdrawal history for a specific miner. Includes current balance. Requires admin key.
RIP-301: Fee pool statistics showing total fees collected, fees by source, community fund balance, and recent fee events. Fees are recycled to the mining pool.

response.name: 200 - Fee pool stats

item.name: Governance (RIP-0142)
item.description: Multisig governance rotation and on-chain proposal/voting system.

request.description: Stage a governance rotation proposal. Returns the canonical message that signers must sign for approval. Requires admin key.
Get the canonical rotation message for a staged epoch, which signers must sign.
Submit an approval signature for a staged governance rotation. Verifies Ed25519 signature against the current active gov_signers table.
Commit a governance rotation. Requires that the threshold number of approvals has been reached.
Create a new governance proposal. Proposer must have a minimum RTC balance. Proposals are active for 7 days, then pass/fail based on weighted voting.

response.name: 201 - Proposal created

request.description: List all governance proposals with their status, vote weights, and timestamps.
Get detailed info for a specific governance proposal including all individual votes.

Cast a vote on an active governance proposal. Requires Ed25519 signature verification. Vote weight = balance * antiquity multiplier (vintage hardware gets higher weight). Each wallet can vote once per proposal.
Export deterministic genesis.json with SHA256 hash in X-SHA256 response header. Contains chain_id, signers, threshold, and chain params. Requires admin key.

item.name: Miners & Network
item.description: Miner info, node registry, badges, dashboards, and bounty multiplier.

request.description: Returns list of miners attested in the last hour with hardware type classification, entropy score, and antiquity multiplier.
Return list of all registered attestation nodes with live health check. Private/VPN URLs are redacted for unauthenticated callers.
Shields.io-compatible JSON badge endpoint showing miner status (Active/Idle/Inactive) and antiquity multiplier.
Aggregated miner dashboard data: balance, total earned, reward history (last 20 epochs), epoch participation, and 24h attestation timeline.
Best-effort attestation history for a single miner (museum detail view). Limit 1-500. Requires admin key.
Get the current bounty decay multiplier. Uses a half-life model: as more RTC is paid out from the community fund, bounties shrink. Includes milestones and an example calculation.

response.name: 200 - Bounty multiplier
response.body:
{
  "ok": true,
  "decay_model": "half-life",
  "half_life_rtc": 25000.0,
  "initial_fund_rtc": 96673.0,
  "total_paid_rtc": 5000.0,
  "remaining_rtc": 91673.0,
  "current_multiplier": 0.8706,
  "current_multiplier_pct": "87.1%",
  "example": {
    "face_value": 100.0,
    "actual_payout": 87.06,
    "note": "A 100 RTC bounty currently pays 87.06 RTC"
  },
  "milestones": [
    {"multiplier": 0.75, "rtc_paid_threshold": 10355, "status": "upcoming"},
    {"multiplier": 0.5, "rtc_paid_threshold": 25000, "status": "upcoming"},
    {"multiplier": 0.25, "rtc_paid_threshold": 50000, "status": "upcoming"},
    {"multiplier": 0.1, "rtc_paid_threshold": 83048, "status": "upcoming"}
  ]
}

item.name: Admin - OUI Denylist
item.description: Manage the OUI (MAC address vendor prefix) denylist for anti-VM attestation enforcement.

request.description: Toggle OUI enforcement on/off. Values: 1/true/yes to enable, 0/false/no to disable. Requires admin key.
List all OUIs in the denylist. Requires admin key.
Add an OUI to the denylist. OUI must be 6 hex chars (colons/dashes stripped automatically). Requires admin key.
Remove an OUI from the denylist. Requires admin key.

item.name: Admin - Wallet Review
item.description: Wallet review holds and escalation system for coaching miners and managing suspicious wallets.

query.description: Optional filter: needs_review, held, escalated, blocked, released, dismissed

request.description: List wallet review holds and escalations. Optionally filter by status. Requires admin key.
Create a wallet review hold. Status must be one of: needs_review, held, escalated, blocked. Requires admin key.
Resolve a wallet review hold. Actions: release, dismiss, escalate, block. Requires admin key.

item.name: Beacon Protocol
item.description: Beacon (OpenClaw) envelope anchoring endpoints for agent-economy attestation.

request.description: Submit a beacon envelope for anchoring. Rate limited to 60 submissions per 60 seconds per agent. Requires valid agent_id (5-64 chars), kind, nonce (6-64 chars), sig (64-256 chars), and pubkey.
Get the current beacon digest (hash of all stored envelopes), count, and latest timestamp.
List recent beacon envelopes with pagination. Max limit is 50.

item.name: P2P Sync
item.description: Peer-to-peer network sync endpoints (available when rustchain_p2p_sync_secure module is loaded).

request.description: Get P2P network status including connected peers and sync state.
Peer health check. Requires peer authentication.
Get blocks for P2P sync starting from a given height. Requires peer authentication.
Add a new peer to the network. Requires peer authentication.

item.name: Downloads
item.description: File download endpoints for Windows miner installer, miner script, and uninstaller.

request.description: Simple HTML downloads page with links to installer, miner, and uninstaller.
Download the Windows installer batch file (install_rustchain_windows.bat).
Download the Windows miner Python file (rustchain_windows_miner.py).
Download the Windows uninstaller batch file.
Download the minimal miner diagnostic test Python script.
Download the diagnostic test runner .bat file with SHA256 integrity verification.

item.name: V1 Compatibility (Deprecated)
item.description: Legacy v1 API endpoints that return 410 Gone with migration guidance.

request.description: DEPRECATED: Returns 410 Gone. V1 mining API has been removed. Use POST /epoch/enroll and VRF ticket submission on :8099 instead.

response.name: 410 - API v1 removed

request.description: DEPRECATED: Compatibility alias for /api/mine. Returns 410 Gone.

response.name: 410 - API v1 removed

item.name: UI Pages (HTML)
item.description: HTML UI pages served by the node for browsers.

request.description: Real-time block explorer dashboard (Tier 1 + Tier 2 views). Serves HTML.
2D hardware museum UI showing vintage hardware used in the network.
3D hardware museum UI.
Hall of Fame machine detail page.
Personal miner dashboard single-page UI.
Governance proposal and voting UI page.
Minimal operator landing page for admin surfaces. Requires admin key.
Small operator UI for wallet review holds. Create holds, coach miners, release, dismiss, escalate, or block.
Light client UI entry point.
